expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly restates the case focus and assesses it against Phase 7 invariants for a different feature: "Case focus (must be explicitly covered): promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature" and "when run against a different feature... here BCIN-976". It then enumerates the promotion/finalization stability checks (Phase 7 only, explicit approval, archive-on-overwrite, finalization record/summary) and ties them to BCIN-976 being "another feature" via fixture labels.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md align the work to the holdout primary phase by focusing on holdout checkpoint validation rather than a full run: execution_notes.md says "Primary phase under test (holdout) was satisfied by assessing Phase 7 promotion/finalization stability" and result.md says "Primary phase under test: Holdout" and "Holdout alignment... addressed by validating the Phase 7 finalization contract... rather than generating a full QA plan."
